[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01101011 5
1 10001010 3
2 11100101 5
3 00011001 3
4 10010111 5
5 11011100 5
6 01101110 5
7 11010110 5
